infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Provision Civils uses your microphone for Afrikaans voice-to-text on daily reports.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Provision Civils uses speech recognition to convert spoken Afrikaans notes into text.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Provision Civils to record GPS location for daily reports.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Provision Civils to access your photo library to attach site photos.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Provision Civils to use your camera to capture site photos.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Provision Civils to use the microphone for voice-to-text on daily reports.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Allow Provision Civils to recognise speech for Afrikaans voice notes.
